MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James McElroy, Esq., 415-282-3072 moving to be relieved as counsel.
Dwayne Robinson, 415-822-3300, defendant and opposing party appearing in propria persona.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court GRANTED JAMES MCELROY, ESQ.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT DWAYNE ROBINSON. THIS WAS AN IN CAMERA HEARING. THE PROCEEDING WAS PLACED UNDER SEAL. Prevailing party to submit form of order. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/JLW)

Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Assigned To Arbitration On Dec-19-05
